creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
bsam        2007-09-09 15:45:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/linux-libxml2 Makefile distinfo.i386 pkg-descr 
                           pkg-plist.i386 
  Log:
  A new port for linux xml2 library. [1]
  
  While I'm here (changes againts shar archive at the PR#116033):
  . remove extra blank line at headers;
  . use INSTALLS_SHLIB instead of USE_LDCONFIG (yep, it is still used at
    linux ports);
  . BRANDELF_DIRS added (linux binaries should be branded);
  . fix pkg-plist (manuals added);
  . fix distinfo (sources added).
  
  PR:             116033  [1]
  Submitted by:   Artem Naluzhnyy <tut@nhamon.com.ua>  [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.16      +9 -9      ports/textproc/linux-libxml2/Makefile
  1.8       +6 -6      ports/textproc/linux-libxml2/distinfo.i386
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/textproc/linux-libxml2/pkg-descr
  1.6       +14 -10    ports/textproc/linux-libxml2/pkg-plist.i386
